page: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-22-standardlssd is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 22 vCPUs mapped to 11 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz. The architecture is x86_64 with dedicated CPU allocation and hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 176 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per vCPU. Storage is bundled with 6442 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity across two drives, while no GPUs are present.

Performance benchmarks indicate solid capabilities across compute and memory subsystems. The instance achieves a single-core stress-ng score of 1622.68 and a multi-core score of 18278.91. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 1495.22 GB/sec and a large block uncached read speed of 99.03 GB/sec. In database operations, the server registers a Passmark database score of 9860.55 and handles 23.89 million Redis SET operations per second. For specialized tasks, the CPU's Advanced Matrix Extensions support text generation for a small 135M LLM model at 321.65 tokens per second, which represents a strong performance tier.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high resource density of 176 GB RAM combined with over 6 TB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage offers a balanced profile for memory-bound and I/O-intensive workloads without requiring separate storage attachments. This configuration is highly suited for large-scale database deployments, in-memory caching layers like Redis, data analytics, and software compilation pipelines.
description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-22-standardlssd is a memory-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 22 dedicated vCPUs and 176 GB of RAM. It features 6442 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-speed local data access without external attachments. The server delivers strong performance in memory-intensive tasks, achieving a cached read bandwidth of 1495.22 GB/sec and 23.89 million Redis SET operations per second. It also supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX, enabling efficient text generation for small LLM models at 321.65 tokens per second. This instance is designed for memory-heavy and storage-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, caching layers, and data processing pipelines.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-22-standardlssd is a memory-optimized server with 22 vCPUs, 176 GB RAM, and 6442 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-performance database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-22-standardlssd features 22 vCPUs, 176 GB RAM, and 6442 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: High-density memory and massive local NVMe storage optimized for demanding database operations and in-memory caching workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 22 dedicated vCPUs and 176 GB RAM
6442 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage included
Delivers 23.89 million Redis SET operations per second
Supports Intel AMX for accelerated small-model LLM text generation
Best suited for in-memory databases, caching, and data-intensive applications
